{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/257676403?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manizada/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manizada/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manizada/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manizada/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/manizada", "id": 257676403, "login": "manizada", "node_id": "U_kgDOD1vUcw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manizada/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manizada/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manizada/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manizada/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manizada/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/manizada", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-33489", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary
CoreDNS' transfer plugin can select the wrong ACL stanza when both a parent zone and a more-specific subzone are configured. A permissive parent-zone transfer rule can override a restrictive subzone rule (name-dependent), allowing an unauthorized client to perform AXFR/IXFR for the subzone and retrieve its zone contents.

### Details
In plugin/transfer/transfer.go, stanza selection is implemented by longestMatch(), which is documented as "longest zone match wins", but it actually chooses the winner via a lexicographic string comparison:
- zone := "" // longest zone match wins (plugin/transfer/transfer.go)
- if z > zone { zone = z; x = xfr } (plugin/transfer/transfer.go)

So, a parent zone like example.org. can beat a child zone like a.example.org. purely due to lexicographic ordering ("example.org." > "a.example.org."), even though the child zone is the longer/more specific suffix match. The bypass is data-dependent (some child labels will win, some will lose), making it operationally non-intuitive.

### PoC
1. Adjust COREDNS_BIN in the PoC to point at right path (see the top-level const definitions for tunables as well)
2. Run python3 ./acl-repro.py
3. Expected output:
*** Baseline (only subzone transfer rule) ***
axfr a.example.org.: rcode=5 ancount=0 (expected REFUSED=5)

*** Candidate (add permissive parent transfer rule) ***
axfr a.example.org.: rcode=0 ancount=5 (expected NOERROR=0 with ancount>0)

*** OK ***
Subzone transfer ACL bypass reproduced: adding a permissive parent-zone stanza can override a stricter child-zone stanza due to lexicographic zone selection.

### Impact
Unauthorized zone transfer can expose full zone contents to a remote network client that was intended to be denied by a subzone-specific transfer policy.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00388, "percentile": 0.30515}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-h8mm-c463-wjq3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-28T22:44:39Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h8mm-c463-wjq3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-h8mm-c463-wjq3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33489"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-05T20:16:36Z", "published_at": "2026-04-28T22:44:39Z", "references": ["https://github.com/coredns/coredns/security/advisories/GHSA-h8mm-c463-wjq3", "https://github.com/coredns/coredns/releases/tag/v1.14.3", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33489", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h8mm-c463-wjq3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/coredns/coredns/security-advisories/GHSA-h8mm-c463-wjq3", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/coredns/coredns", "summary": "CoreDNS' transfer stanza selection uses lexicographic compare (subzone ACL bypass)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T15:28:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-h8mm-c463-wjq3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.14.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/coredns/coredns"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.14.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: CoreDNS' transfer stanza selection uses lexicographic compare (subzone ACL bypass)
